metadata.title: Privacy Policy - LinkFlow AI
metadata.description: Learn how LinkFlow AI protects your privacy and handles your data with AES-256 encryption, read-only API access, and transparent practices.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: LinkFlow AI ('we,' 'us,' or 'our') respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you use LinkFlow AI Dashboard to monitor your digital business assets.

items.subtitle: Account Information
items.content: When you sign up, we collect your email address and name (via Google OAuth or email login) to create and manage your account.

items.subtitle: Integration Metrics (Read-Only)
items.content: To power your dashboard, we fetch aggregated metrics (e.g., revenue totals, visitor counts, uptime status) from third-party platforms you connect ˇŞ including Stripe, Google Analytics 4, Shopify, Lemon Squeezy, and Creem ˇŞ using API keys you voluntarily provide. We request only the minimum data required and strictly enforce read-only access.

items.subtitle: Encrypted API Credentials
items.content: API keys and access tokens you provide are encrypted using AES-256 standards before being stored in our isolated, access-controlled database hosted on Neon. No plaintext credentials are ever stored or accessible, even to system administrators.

items.subtitle: Usage Data
items.content: We collect anonymous technical data (e.g., browser type, time zone, page interactions) to optimize performance and improve our service.

items.subtitle: Dashboard Visualization Only
items.content: We aggregate and display your business metrics exclusively for your private viewing within your LinkFlow AI dashboard.

items.subtitle: Anomaly Alerts
items.content: If you configure alert rules, we use your metrics data to detect anomalies (e.g., site downtime, revenue drops) and notify you via email.

items.subtitle: Security & Encryption
items.content: All API keys are encrypted with AES-256 standards. We follow a Zero-PII Storage policy: we do not fetch, store, or process your customers' names, addresses, payment card details, or any other personally identifiable information from third-party platforms.

items.subtitle: No Data Selling
items.content: We never sell, rent, share, or use your financial figures or business metrics for our own market analysis or any commercial purpose beyond providing the LinkFlow AI service.

third_party.title: Third-Party Data Handling
third_party.content: LinkFlow AI connects to third-party services (Stripe, Google Analytics 4, Shopify, Lemon Squeezy, Creem) solely to retrieve aggregated operational metrics on your behalf. We do not share, sell, or transfer any data obtained from these integrations to other third parties. Data fetched from these platforms is used exclusively to populate your personal dashboard.

data_minimization.title: Data Minimization & Read-Only Policy
data_minimization.content: LinkFlow AI is built on a strict data minimization principle. We only request read-only permissions from third-party platforms. We never request write, modify, or delete permissions. We do not store your customers' personal identifiable information (PII) such as names, addresses, email addresses, or payment card details from any connected platform.

data_retention.title: Data Retention
data_retention.content: We retain your information only as long as your account is active. Once you disconnect an integration or delete your account, all associated API keys and cached metrics data are permanently and irreversibly purged from our servers within 30 days.

compliance.title: GDPR & CCPA Compliance
compliance.content: We strive to comply with global privacy standards including GDPR and CCPA. You have the right to access, correct, export, or permanently delete your data at any time through your dashboard settings or by contacting us at support@LinkFlow AI.app.

cookies.title: Cookies & Local Storage
cookies.content: LinkFlow AI uses cookies and browser local storage solely to maintain your authenticated session and remember your preferences. We do not use third-party advertising cookies or behavioral tracking technologies.

transparency_note.content: Have questions about our privacy practices? Contact us at support@LinkFlow AI.app. We believe in full transparency and will respond within 2 business days.
